title: Kot Mumin Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kot Mumin with extreme temperatures. The Z-Score of +4.46 indicates a rare event.
body:
The current heat wave in Kot Mumin has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is extremely high, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 14.6 GG, and a relative humidity of 40%. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 10.3 km/h, but it does not provide significant relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
